title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 1-1 draw vs. Lionel Messi and Inter Miami
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution New England kept Messi off the scoresheet, and walked away with a hard-earned point.
Carles Gil celebrates scoring for the Revolution against Inter Miami on April 25.

Via New England Revolution By Hayden Bird April 26, 2026 | 9:10 AM 2 minutes to read The Revolution registered a 1-1 draw against Inter Miami at Nu Stadium on Saturday evening, denying Lionel Messi both the scoresheet and the win.

author: Conor Ryan
